resource.valueString:
LINES AND TUBES: None.
 LUNGS AND PLEURA:
 Clear lungs. Normal pulmonary vascularity.
 No pleural effusion.
 No pneumothorax.
 HEART, MEDIASTINUM AND HILA:
 Heart is normal in size.
 Normal mediastinal and hilar contour.
 BONES AND SOFT TISSUES:
 No acute abnormality.
